  • Overview

  • Help

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
BlockChunk
Represents a chunk of blocks in a schematic, providing access to block data, chunk position, and chunk properties.
BlockChunkImpl
Implementation of the BlockChunk interface representing a batch of blocks in a schematic.
BlockChunkIndexEncoder
An IndexEncoder that organises block placements in a recursive quadtree-like chunk hierarchy and serialises that hierarchy to a compact binary index.
BlockChunkIterator
A BlockIterator that performs a depth-first traversal of a BlockChunk tree.
BlockChunkUtils
 
BlockData
Represents a block data
BlockDataEncoder
Strategy interface for encoding and decoding individual BlockData values in a schematic file's block-data section.
BlockIterator
An iterator for a 3d block-based map
BlockPlacement
Represents a block placement
BlockPointer
 
BlockProp<T>
Represents a block metadata.
BlockProp.Legacy
Contains legacy (1.8) block data keys
BlockPropFormat<T>
An encoder/decoder responsible for converting block props to and from binary form
BodyExtension<T>
Custom data that can be stored on the schematic file.
BodyExtensionFormat<T>
Encodes and decodes a body extension
BooleanBlockProp
Represents a boolean block property
BooleanPropFormat
 
ByteBlockProp
Represents a byte block property
ByteBlockPropFormat
 
ChunkPointer
 
CocoaSchematicFormat<T extends Schematic>
The primary SchematicFormat implementation for the Cocoa Beans Schematic (CBSC) format.
CocoaSchematicFormat.Headers
Tag constants for the typed header entries in a CBSC file.
CompressionBlockInfo
Immutable metadata record that describes a single compressed body section within a CBSC schematic file (block-data section, index section, or a body extension).
CompressionEngine
Represents a compression engine.
CompressionType
Represents a compression type supported by the library
EnumPropFormat<T extends Enum<T>>
 
FlippableProp<T>
Represents a flip aware prop
IndexEncoder
Strategy interface for encoding and decoding the spatial index section of a schematic file.
IntArrayPropFormat
 
IntBlockProp
Represents an integer block property
IntPropFormat
 
ListStringBlockProp
Represents a string list block property
ListStringBlockPropFormat
 
MutableBlockChunk
A mutable chunk of blocks, allowing modification of block data.
MutableBlockChunkImpl
MutableBlockChunkImpl provides a mutable implementation of BlockChunk, allowing for dynamic modification of block data within a chunk.
PasteOperation
Represents a schematic paste operation
PasteResult
Represents the results of a paste operation
Pointer
 
RotatableProp<T>
Represents a rotation aware property value.
Schematic
Represents a 3d schematic
SchematicBuilder
Schematic builder
SchematicFactory<S extends Schematic>
Platform-specific schematic factory
SchematicFormat<T extends Schematic>
Strategy interface for serialising and deserialising Schematic objects to and from a binary stream.
SchematicMetadata
Represents metadata of a schematic
SchematicMetadataBuilder
A schematic metadata builder
SimpleBlockDataEncoder
A straightforward BlockDataEncoder that serialises each BlockData value as a length-prefixed payload containing the block's namespaced type key followed by its properties.
SortedAxisBlockIterator
 
StringBlockProp
Represents a string block property
StringBlockPropFormat
